from source import hanoi


def test_hanoi_moves_largest_disk_to_end():
    result = hanoi(2, start=1, end=3)
    expected = [(1, 2), (1, 3), (2, 3)]
    assert result == expected, (
        f"Expected {expected}, got {result}. "
        f"Largest disk must move directly from start (1) to end (3), not to helper (2)."
    )
